atlassian.description: Jira, read only here, for OKR objectives and key results. Replace with the official Atlassian remote MCP URL, or authorize Jira through the Cowork connector directory instead.

looker.description: Looker, read only, for growth and product metrics. Replace with your Looker remote MCP endpoint, or wire a custom connector in Cowork. Not part of the default connector set.

netsuite.description: NetSuite, read only, for the monthly financial report. Replace with your NetSuite remote MCP endpoint, or wire a custom connector in Cowork. Not part of the default connector set.
